sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101238" key="suriggo/podes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡριγγό-ποδες</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στίχοι</foreign>, prob. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συρόποδες</foreign> (= <sense id="n101238.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fistulares versus</tr_>) in Diom. p. 498 K.</sense> </entryFree>
